positive: A stylized, high-contrast linework illustration of a crescent moon intersecting with flowing, abstract planetary rings and bioluminescent nebula smoke. The composition should be perfectly symmetrical and central, creating a balanced, mesmerizing mandala effect. Use a limited color palette of deep indigo, vibrant electric blue, glowing cyan, and stark white lines. The overall aesthetic is modern celestial minimalism, with clean, solid silhouettes and graphic, geometric elements balanced by soft, wispy cosmic gradients. Intricate detailing within the central pattern, suitable for screen printing on black fabric. Vector art quality, perfect negative space, crisp lines, graphic novel style, high contrast, volumetric lighting.
negative: blurry, noisy, realistic, photorealistic, grainy, watermark, signature, text, letters, logo, messy, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, distorted, poor quality, low resolution
